description: Creates a line on a 2D graph from a mathematical equation string. Supports slope-intercept form (y=mx+b) and standard form (ax+by=c).
utility: Draw a line from an equation

arguments.name: equation
arguments.description: Equation string in slope-intercept ("y=mx+b") or standard form ("ax+by=c")

arguments.name: options
arguments.description: Color, dashed style, or stroke width

alternates.description: Line parsed from equation string, e.g. "y=2x+3"
Line parsed from standard form, e.g. "3x+4y=12"

examples.scenario: Line from standard-form equation for axis intercepts (axis intercepts lesson)
Line from equation for diameter check (diameter through center lesson)
Line from equation on explanation slide (diameter through center lesson)
